positive: A stylized, whimsical illustration featuring a gentle woodland scene at twilight. Central to the composition is a trio of highly detailed, bioluminescent mushrooms growing around a peacefully sleeping fox. The mushrooms emit a soft, vibrant neon glow (cyan and amethyst), illuminating ferns, intricate roots, and dew-covered moss. The overall aesthetic should be a detailed Japanese Ukiyo-e meet modern graphic sticker art, utilizing bold, clean silhouettes and strong contrasts against a deep midnight indigo background. The composition must be centrally framed, perfect for a circular or square print on apparel. Vector art style, high contrast, maximal detail, graphic novel ink lines.
negative: blurry, watermark, text, low quality, artifacts, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, logo, signature, copyright, ugly, realistic photo, photorealism, messy, cluttered
